response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified performer as Houshou Marine based on visual appearance and on-screen credits.
2. Song title 'Bishoujo Muzai Pirates' confirmed via on-screen text at the start.
3. Used search query '"Bishoujo Muzai Pirates" Houshou Marine Japanese and English lyrics' to obtain the lyrics.
4. Broke the performance into three chronological scenes based on visual shifts on the background screens and the structure of the song.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by the VTuber Houshou Marine, singing her original song 'Bishoujo Muzai Pirates'. The performance includes visual effects, background screens with anime-style visuals, and a large audience with glow sticks.

scenes.description: Houshou Marine starts the song on stage, with the background screen displaying the song title and credits. The audience is cheering.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: ドキドキしてルージュ？ / いきますよ～！ / （無罪！無罪！美少女無罪！） / （マリン！マリン！マリンは無罪！） / （やっぱキラキラ もっとクラクラ） / ねぇ、言ったよね？ / 年齢なんて関係ないってさ / そういう面倒くさいのも / 含めて愛してくれるって / ねぇねぇ、言ったよね？言ってない？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Heart-racing, rouge? / Here we go! / (Innocent, innocent, beautiful girl innocent!) / (Marine, marine, Marine is innocent!) / (After all, sparkling, more dizzying!) / Hey, you said it, right? / That age doesn't matter, right? / And even that, / You'd love me, including that annoying stuff, right? / Hey hey, you said it, right? Did you not?

scenes.description: Marine continues the performance with energetic choreography; the background screen shows various animated clips of the character.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 言ってないとか言ってない / そんなこと言うんだ / ちなみにこの船では / 美少女無罪が適用されますけど / 流させて / 魔法で輝く / 秘密の素顔はキミにだけ / 特別ですよ？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I will love you even if you are not, / I have said it before, haven't I? / But, / My heart beats with rouge! / I'm Your Treasure Box! / You have found Captain Marine from the treasure box! / Hololive! / So, / Please, please! / Let me go! / My secret face is just for you! / Special, you know!

scenes.description: The song approaches its finale with intense lighting and cheering, followed by the concluding dance sequence.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: ドキドキしてルージュ？ / （無罪！無罪！美少女無罪！） / （マリン！マリン！マリンは無罪！） / （やっぱキラキラ もっとクラクラ） / マリンじゃなくて / マリン船長だ！ / 無罪！無罪！美少女無罪！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Do-ki-do-ki, heart racing, rouge? / (Innocent, innocent, beautiful girl innocent!) / (Marine, marine, Marine is innocent!) / (After all, sparkling, more dizzying!) / I am not just Marine! / I am Marine the Captain! / Innocent! Innocent! Beautiful girl innocent!
